meaning: n.印度 Hyderabad君主的称号,土耳其正规军的士兵
examples: Nizam, was elected club chairman in 1960 and naturally since liberation, all the chairmen have been Bangladeshis.
When he was deposed in 1948, the last Nizam was adjudged the richest man in the world.
It includes glittering hi-tech areas and the 400-year-old historic Charminar district set up by the city's former rulers, the Nizam.
